data.body: PRE-FLIGHT FIXES + 72b6 DECISION (session 2). First full 'make test' caught 5 failures; 4 real (fixed), 1 environmental. FIXED: (1) verify.py crossed 800 soft cap -> refactored the 3 conditional-veto binaries into a DRY comprehension + terse descriptions (convention: full rubric lives in verifier prompts), back to exactly 800; (2+3) det_floor.py 957->975 (a8e5 backstop) and passes.py 852->861 (d4cf coach move) exceeded pinned ceilings -> bumped module-size-ceilings.txt + architecture.md remedy rows; (4) test_threshold_recalibration pinned routing table -> added G7 (0.95, advisory); G7 prompt front-matter -> canonicalized via write_front_matter. ENVIRONMENTAL (not fixed, not a regression): test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module fails only because this worktree's .venv is IN-repo so yaml resolves repo-local; unchanged on origin/main, CI env unaffected. Fixes folded into a8e5(60b39b7b7->) and d4cf(a14e0f392) via git commit --fixup + GIT_SEQUENCE_EDITOR=true rebase --autosquash (Change-Ids preserved, DCO+trailers intact). 72b6 CLOSED (idea->closed) as handled-by-process per operator decision: data-logging documented (AC2 comment + committed g7-promotion-path.md), next calibration picks it up; epic AC3 amended to match (no standalone tracking ticket); provisional-0.54 caveat preserved in b9c0 AC. Re-running full make test as final pre-flight before Gerrit push.
